businessSummary.oneLiner: The undisputed AI computing leader — dominating global AI infrastructure with data center GPUs and accelerators
businessSummary.description: NVIDIA is the world's largest semiconductor design company, with AI training/inference data center accelerators as its core revenue driver. Q4 FY2026 revenue $68.13B (+73% YoY), EPS $1.62. Q1 FY2027 guidance $78B (±2%), beating consensus by $5.4B. Mar 3 close $180.05 (-1.33%). Iran-Hormuz geopolitical risk and 'Great Rotation' out of tech stocks pressured shares. CoreWeave IPO guidance miss added to sentiment. GTC 2026 (3/16-19) Rubin R200 reveal D-13. P/E 36.74x, Forward P/E 21.83x, PEG 0.54.
howTheyMakeMoney: Data Center: AI training/inference GPUs (H100, H200, Blackwell B200/GB200/GB300) — ~91% of revenue
Gaming: GeForce RTX series GPUs and DLSS 4 technology
Automotive: DRIVE platform autonomous driving and vehicle AI chips
Software/Platforms: CUDA ecosystem, NVIDIA AI Enterprise, Omniverse
keyProducts: Blackwell Ultra GB300: Latest AI accelerator, 50x throughput vs Hopper, 2026 shipments up 129% YoY
Blackwell B200/GB200: Sold out across hyperscalers
H100/H200 Tensor Core GPU: AI industry standard
Rubin R200: Next-gen GPU, official reveal at GTC 2026 (3/16-19)
DGX/HGX Systems: Turnkey AI training servers

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable for growth profile. Compressed from 52-week highs

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2027 EPS $8.25. PEG 0.54 signals undervaluation vs growth

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Industry-leading. Reflects dominant AI accelerator position

keyMetrics.name: Debt/Equity
keyMetrics.interpretation: Very healthy balance sheet. Net cash $43.2B

keyMetrics.name: PEG
keyMetrics.interpretation: Clear undervaluation vs growth. Core of Goldman, JPMorgan bull thesis

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 (3/16-19) — Rubin R200 Reveal D-13
growthDrivers.description: Jensen Huang to unveil next-gen Rubin (R200) architecture. 5x performance vs Blackwell. Event-driven re-rating potential.

growthDrivers.title: Lumentum & Coherent $2B Each — Photonics Strategy
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA investing $4B total in optical companies to integrate photonic technology into data center chips.

growthDrivers.title: CoreWeave CapEx Doubling to $30B+ — GPU Demand Direct
growthDrivers.description: CoreWeave doubling 2026 CapEx to $30B+. Combined hyperscaler CapEx ~$700B. Direct GPU demand driver.

growthDrivers.title: Q4 FY2026 13th Consecutive Earnings Beat — Q1 Guidance $78B
growthDrivers.description: Revenue $68.13B (+73% YoY), EPS $1.62. Q1 guidance $78B beats consensus by $5.4B.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: CUDA ecosystem (15M+ developers), annual architecture refresh, dominant NVLink performance, 80%+ AI accelerator market share — virtual monopoly.

moats.description: CUDA 15+ year history. 15M+ developers optimized for NVIDIA.
Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin annual refresh. GB300 is 50x more efficient than Hopper.
Secured majority of TSMC's advanced CoWoS packaging capacity.
Multi-year partnerships with Meta, OpenAI, Eli Lilly.

competitors.name: AMD
competitors.detail: MI300X/MI350 at 10-12% market share. MI450 (2nm) planned.

competitors.name: Intel
competitors.detail: Gaudi 3 launched but minimal market share.

competitors.name: Custom Silicon
competitors.detail: Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia — hyperscaler self-chips accelerating.

competitors.name: Huawei Ascend
competitors.detail: NVIDIA alternative in China. Export controls limit NVIDIA's China share.

recentNews.headline: NVDA -1.33% — Iran Geopolitical Risk + Great Rotation Out of Tech
recentNews.significance: Rising yields and inflation fears driving funds from tech to defensives. Pre-GTC correction.

recentNews.headline: CoreWeave IPO Guidance Miss — CapEx $30B+ but Q4 Loss $284M
recentNews.significance: Key NVDA cloud customer's IPO guidance disappoints. Customer concentration risk resurfaces.

recentNews.headline: NVIDIA Invests $2B Each in Lumentum and Coherent
recentNews.significance: Photonic technology integration for next-gen AI infrastructure.

recentNews.headline: GTC 2026 Confirmed for March 16-19 — Rubin GPU Reveal
recentNews.significance: Rubin R200 and Feynman architecture reveal. GB300 shipments up 129% YoY in 2026.

recentNews.headline: CNBC: NVDA Is a 'Coiled Spring' After Blockbuster Earnings
recentNews.significance: JPMorgan notes Q1 guidance beat by $5.4B yet stock flat. GTC expected to be the trigger.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 36 of 38 Buy. Strong Buy consensus $263 (+46%). Citi $300, Bernstein $300, JPMorgan $265. Forward P/E 21.83x with PEG 0.54 — 'historically cheap' assessment dominates.

risks.title: Iran-Hormuz Blockade → Inflation Reignition, Rate Cut Delay
risks.description: Oil surge may reignite inflation, pushing back rate cuts and compressing growth multiples.

risks.title: Trump Tariffs & AI Chip Export Controls
risks.description: 15-20% semiconductor tariffs and tightened China AI chip restrictions.

risks.title: CoreWeave Guidance Miss — Customer Concentration Risk
risks.description: Key cloud customer's IPO guidance miss raises concerns about NVDA's reliance on few large buyers.

risks.title: Great Rotation — Tech to Defensives
risks.description: Rising yields + geopolitical risk accelerating rotation from tech to defensives/commodities.

risks.title: Big Tech Custom Silicon Acceleration
risks.description: Google TPU v6, Amazon Trainium3, Microsoft Maia scaling up. Long-term TAM erosion risk.

buyReasons.title: GTC 2026 (3/16-19) — Major Catalyst in 13 Days
buyReasons.rationale: Rubin R200 reveal with 5x Blackwell performance. Realistic event-driven re-rating.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 21.83x, PEG 0.54 — Historically Cheap
buyReasons.rationale: For a 65%+ growth company, Forward P/E 22x and PEG 0.54 is a rare opportunity.

buyReasons.title: CoreWeave CapEx 2x Expansion ($30B+)
buyReasons.rationale: Despite IPO guidance miss, CapEx doubling means more GPU orders.

buyReasons.title: 36/38 Analysts Buy — Consensus $263 (+46%)
buyReasons.rationale: Overwhelming buy support. Citi & Bernstein $300. GB300 shipments +129% YoY.

overallOpinion: Mar 3 close $180.05 (-1.33%). Iran-Hormuz geopolitical risk and Great Rotation driving tech sell-off. CoreWeave IPO guidance miss adds pressure. GTC 2026 D-13.
36 of 38 Buy. Strong Buy consensus $263 (+46%). Forward P/E 21.83x, PEG 0.54 — historically cheap for 55%+ growth. CoreWeave CapEx 2x ($30B+) confirms GPU demand.
$180.05, above 200-day $170, below 50-day $186. RSI 43 neutral. Breaking $186 before GTC is the key short-term test.
